__meta.description: DESIGN.md v4 drift baseline. Extract-tokens compares current drift against this file when invoked with --baseline. Any new signature or growth beyond count fails --strict. Reductions are always allowed. Reseed only when a DESIGN.md contract change intentionally shifts what counts as drift; document reseed in the PR that changes DESIGN.md. Extended in v5 with 5 additional bucket keys (messageRoles / streaming / presence / toolApproval / artifactHue), all seeded at count 0 because v5 is docs-only; no code-side implementation exists yet.
